verification_questions.question: Does InviteLink type have all required fields (nonce, groupId, createdAt, label?, muted)?
verification_questions.evidence: inviteLinkStorage.ts defines InviteLink with nonce: string, groupId: string, createdAt: number, label?: string, muted: boolean

verification_questions.question: Does PendingJoinRequest type have all required fields (pubkeyHex, nonce, groupId, receivedAt, nickname?, eventId)?
verification_questions.evidence: joinRequestStorage.ts defines PendingJoinRequest with pubkeyHex: string, nonce: string, groupId: string, receivedAt: number, nickname?: string, eventId: string

verification_questions.question: Do the storage modules use idb-keyval with separate IDB databases matching the spec (quizzl-invite-links/links, quizzl-join-requests/requests)?
Does savePendingJoinRequest deduplicate by pubkeyHex + groupId as specified in AC-2?
verification_questions.evidence: joinRequestStorage.ts savePendingJoinRequest checks all entries for matching pubkeyHex + groupId before inserting; test confirms second request with same combo is a no-op

verification_questions.question: Are all CRUD operations (save, load, get, update, delete, clear) covered by unit tests?
verification_questions.evidence: inviteLinkStorage.test.ts: 14 tests covering save, get, loadByGroup, loadAll, updateMuted, delete. joinRequestStorage.test.ts: 11 tests covering save, dedup, loadByGroup, delete, clearForGroup

verification_questions.question: Do all existing tests still pass alongside the new tests?
verification_questions.evidence: make test-unit: 17 files passed (253 tests) vs baseline 15 files (228 tests)

verification_questions.question: Do the modules follow existing codebase patterns (idb-keyval imports, createStore pattern, async CRUD)?
verification_questions.evidence: Pattern matches groupStorage.ts: createStore() for IDB database isolation, get/set/del for CRUD, entries() for filtered queries
